channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump's counterterrorism strategy makes targeting drug cartels the top priority
item.description: President Trump has signed off on a new U.S. counterterrorism strategy that sets eliminating drug cartels in the Western Hemisphere as the administration's highest priority.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump has signed off on a new U.S. counterterrorism strategy that sets eliminating drug cartels in the Western Hemisphere as the administration's highest priority.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Have you lost or are worried about losing SNAP benefits? NPR wants to hear your story
item.description: NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.
item.content:encoded:
NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Iran is reviewing a U.S. proposal as Trump threatens renewed bombing if it doesn't agree
item.description: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman said negotiators are assessing the Trump administration's latest proposal and will relate a response to mediating country Pakistan.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman said negotiators are assessing the Trump administration's latest proposal and will relate a response to mediating country Pakistan.

(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Do you say 'wash' or 'warsh?' Here's where the pronunciation comes from
item.description: Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve chair, Kevin Warsh, has dominated headlines for weeks. For some, his surname is a reminder of a disappearing accent in South Midland America.
item.content:encoded:
Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve chair, Kevin Warsh, has dominated headlines for weeks. For some, his surname is a reminder of a disappearing accent in South Midland America.

(Image credit: Fox Photos/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Rubio says U.S. combat operations in Iran are over as focus shifts to negotiations, takeaways from Tuesday's primaries in Ohio and Indiana, poll finds Democrats are in a strong position for midterms.
item.content:encoded: Rubio says U.S. combat operations in Iran are over as focus shifts to negotiations, takeaways from Tuesday's primaries in Ohio and Indiana, poll finds Democrats are in a strong position for midterms.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Tornado outbreaks catch forecasters by surprise after National Weather Service cuts
item.description: Staffing cuts forced the National Weather Service to cut early morning weather balloon launches. Then two tornado outbreaks this spring caught forecasters by surprise.
item.content:encoded: Staffing cuts forced the National Weather Service to cut early morning weather balloon launches. Then two tornado outbreaks this spring caught forecasters by surprise.
item.dc:creator: Frank Morris

item.title: Trump-backed Ramaswamy wins Ohio governor primary, setting up a competitive Nov. race
item.description: In Ohio, where a Democrat hasn't won an election for governor in 20 years, Republican Vivek Ramaswamy and Democrat Amy Acton could be in for a tight race this fall.
item.content:encoded: In Ohio, where a Democrat hasn't won an election for governor in 20 years, Republican Vivek Ramaswamy and Democrat Amy Acton could be in for a tight race this fall.
item.dc:creator: Karen Kasler

item.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI over claims chatbot posed as doctor
item.description: State officials allege a Character.AI bot claimed to be a licensed psychiatrist and provided a fake state medical license number.
item.content:encoded:
State officials allege a Character.AI bot claimed to be a licensed psychiatrist and provided a fake state medical license number.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Shannon Bond

item.title: Scott Turow's latest real-life legal thriller: Suing Meta for copyright infringement
item.description: Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.
item.content:encoded:
Five major publishing houses and the bestselling author are suing Meta and its CEO Mark Zuckerberg for allegedly training its Llama generative AI models on millions of copyrighted materials.

(Image credit: Thos Robinson)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'Transformation' of the U.S. Forest Service looks like dismantling to critics
item.description: In the month since the Trump administration announced a major reorganization of the U.S. Forest Service, critics have called it a stealth dismantling. The plan includes moving its headquarters.
item.content:encoded: In the month since the Trump administration announced a major reorganization of the U.S. Forest Service, critics have called it a stealth dismantling. The plan includes moving its headquarters.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Cohen
